category_sources: Official repository README describes gtop as a terminal system monitoring dashboard.
source_facts.description says gtop is a system monitoring dashboard for terminal.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README shows npm-based installation, supporting the Node.js tag.
source_facts.description supports system-monitor, terminal, and dashboard tags.
